message:
fix(runtime): add active state guard to exit_safe_mode (bd-3agr)

exit_safe_mode() did not check self.active before allowing exit,
violating INV-SMO-RECOVERY. Calling exit on an inactive controller
would emit spurious deactivation events. Added early return with
ExitPreconditionFailed when safe mode is not active.
Regression test added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
